name: Pack Maintenance Review
description: Assess pack/session drift for an active phase and propose bounded updates with log traceability.

notes: Do not apply broad pack/session rewrites without explicit approval.
Log affected IDs and validation status for every accepted change.
Record health snapshot and recommendation feedback updates for each maintenance pass.
Recommendation ranking must include deterministic score breakdown and why-now explanation.
Run coverage and policy/safety preflight checks before applying non-trivial self-gardening updates.
Self-gardening updates must use the same review stop points and cannot bypass approval gates.
